investigation_meta.finding: NO live webhook captured with message 'Purchase karein' or type interactive + purchase CTA in retained Railway logs
investigation_meta.note: Payloads below are evidence-backed: one LIVE captured Olli text message envelope, plus SYNTHETIC shapes validated by parser unit tests and dist parser-trace run

synthetic_option_a_meta_button_reply_id.source: whatsapp-inbound.parser.spec.ts — Meta button_reply shape (works in parser trace)
synthetic_option_a_meta_button_reply_id.label: Option A — button_reply.id only

synthetic_option_b_olli_title_only.source: whatsapp-inbound.parser.spec.ts — documented GetOlli interactive tap (title in data.text); adapted for Purchase karein
synthetic_option_b_olli_title_only.label: Option B — Olli echoes button title only

synthetic_option_c_olli_text_plus_button.source: Parser precedence analysis — if Olli sends BOTH data.text and button_reply.id
synthetic_option_c_olli_text_plus_button.label: Option C — text field takes precedence; button_reply.id ignored
synthetic_option_c_olli_text_plus_button.critical_note: button_reply.id is present in payload but NEVER read because data.text branch returns first
